glosses.ja: 運動場; グラウンド

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns am Sportplatz um vier.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns am ˈʃpɔʁtplats ʊm fiːɐ̯/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns am Sportplatz um vier.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns am ˈʃpɔʁtplats ʊm fiːɐ̯/
translations.en: We’re meeting at the sports field at four.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el campo deportivo a las cuatro.
translations.fr: On se retrouve au terrain de sport à quatre heures.
translations.it: Ci vediamo al campo sportivo alle quattro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们四点在运动场见面。
translations.yue: 我哋四點喺運動場見面。
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar no campo de esportes às quatro.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở sân thể thao lúc bốn giờ.
translations.nl: We spreken af op het sportveld om vier uur.
translations.uk: Зустрічаємося на спортивному майданчику о четвертій.
translations.hi: हम चार बजे खेल मैदान में मिल रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się na boisku o czwartej.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på idrettsbanen klokka fire.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di lapangan olahraga pukul empat.
translations.sv: Vi ses på idrottsplatsen klockan fyra.
translations.ro: Ne întâlnim la terenul de sport la ora patru.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se na hřišti ve čtyři.
translations.da: Vi mødes på sportspladsen klokken fire.
translations.ja: 四時に運動場で会います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present, 1st person plural; denotes the action of meeting.
Personal/reflexive pronoun, 1st person plural accusative; reciprocal/reflexive object of 'treffen'.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing dative, marking location.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'am' (dative), indicating the place.
Preposition used for time expressions, governing accusative; means 'at' (a time).
Cardinal numeral functioning as a time point with 'um'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder spielen heute auf dem Sportplatz.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈʃpiːlən ˈhɔɪ̯tə aʊ̯f deːm ˈʃpɔʁtplats/

translations.de: Die Kinder spielen heute auf dem Sportplatz.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈʃpiːlən ˈhɔɪ̯tə aʊ̯f deːm ˈʃpɔʁtplats/
translations.en: The children are playing on the sports field today.
translations.es: Hoy los niños juegan en el campo deportivo.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, les enfants jouent sur le terrain de sport.
translations.it: Oggi i bambini giocano al campo sportivo.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们今天在运动场上玩耍。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友今日喺運動場玩。
translations.pt: Hoje as crianças estão brincando no campo de esportes.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bọn trẻ đang chơi ở sân thể thao.
translations.nl: De kinderen spelen vandaag op het sportveld.
translations.uk: Діти сьогодні грають на спортивному майданчику.
translations.hu: A gyerekek ma a sportpályán játszanak.
translations.hi: बच्चे आज खेल मैदान में खेल रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci dziś bawią się na boisku.
translations.el: Σήμερα τα παιδιά παίζουν στο γήπεδο.
translations.nb: I dag leker barna på idrettsbanen.
translations.id: Hari ini anak-anak bermain di lapangan olahraga.
translations.ro: Astăzi copiii se joacă pe terenul de sport.
translations.cs: Děti si dnes hrají na hřišti.
translations.da: I dag leger børnene på sportspladsen.
translations.ja: 今日、子どもたちは運動場で遊んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner for 'Kinder'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb in present, 3rd person plural; describes the activity.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates the time (today).
Preposition; with dative when indicating location.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; marks the noun as the object of 'auf' (location).
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'auf' (dative), place of the activity.

sentences.target: Ich wohne gleich neben dem Sportplatz.

translations.de: Ich wohne gleich neben dem Sportplatz.
translations.en: I live right next to the sports field.
translations.es: Vivo justo al lado del campo deportivo.
translations.fr: J’habite juste à côté du terrain de sport.
translations.it: Abito proprio accanto al campo sportivo.
translations.ru: Я живу прямо рядом со спортплощадкой.
translations.pt: Eu moro bem ao lado do campo de esportes.
translations.he: אני גר ממש ליד מגרש הספורט.
translations.vi: Tôi sống ngay bên cạnh sân thể thao.
translations.nl: Ik woon vlak naast het sportveld.
translations.uk: Я живу прямо поруч зі спортивним майданчиком.
translations.hi: मैं खेल मैदान के बिलकुल पास रहता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya tinggal tepat di sebelah lapangan olahraga.
translations.ro: Locuiesc chiar lângă terenul de sport.
translations.da: Jeg bor lige ved siden af sportspladsen.
translations.ja: 運動場のすぐそばに住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb in present, 1st person singular; expresses residence.
Adverb meaning 'right/just'; intensifies the proximity expressed by the PP.
Preposition; with dative for location ('next to').
Definite article, dative masculine singular; marks the noun as object of 'neben'.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'neben' (dative), indicating location.

translations.en: We’re going to the sports field later.
translations.es: Más tarde vamos al campo deportivo.
translations.fr: On va au terrain de sport plus tard.
translations.it: Più tardi andiamo al campo sportivo.
translations.pt: Mais tarde vamos ao campo de esportes.
translations.vi: Lát nữa chúng ta sẽ ra sân thể thao.
translations.nl: We gaan later naar het sportveld.
translations.uk: Ми підемо на спортивний майданчик пізніше.
translations.hi: हम बाद में खेल मैदान जाएँगे.
translations.id: Nanti kita pergi ke lapangan olahraga.
translations.ro: Mai târziu mergem la terenul de sport.
translations.ja: あとで運動場に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb in present, 1st person plural; denotes movement.
Comparative adverb modifying the verb; indicates a later time.
Contraction of 'zu dem'; preposition governing dative, marking direction toward a place.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'zum' (dative), goal of motion.
